/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libturboquant_lib.dylib -install_name @rpath/libturboquant_lib.dylib CMakeFiles/turboquant_lib.dir/turboquant/turboquant.cpp.o -F/Applications/Xcode-26.0.1.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/andromeda/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/mlx/lib /Users/andromeda/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/mlx/lib/libmlx.dylib -framework Metal -framework Foundation -framework QuartzCore -framework Accelerate
